x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The customer is the target audience for the Customer Offer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: The entity offering the Customer Offer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Team
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who plays a critical role in communicating the offer to potential customers, explaining its benefits, and assisting customers in accepting the offer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing Team
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who is responsible for creating and promoting the Customer Offer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal and Compliance Team
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who is is responsible for ensuring that the Customer Offer complies with relevant laws and regulations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Analytics and Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description: A teams or individuals who is responsible for tracking the performance of Customer Offers. They collect data on how the offer is received by customers, how many customers accept it, and the impact on sales or customer acquisition.
